reddit_subreddits.name: ediscovery
reddit_subreddits.context: Primary hunting ground. Attorneys and lit support professionals discussing costs, tools, workflow pain. Anyone asking about alternatives or complaining about Relativity/DISCO/Nuix pricing is a potential RaaS lead.

reddit_subreddits.name: LitigationSupport
reddit_subreddits.context: Litigation support professionals — the people who actually manage document review, eDiscovery platforms, and case databases. Direct buyers or influencers for RaaS.

reddit_subreddits.name: lawfirm
reddit_subreddits.context: Small/mid firm operations. These firms are the RaaS sweet spot — too small for enterprise eDiscovery platforms, big enough to have document-heavy cases.

reddit_subreddits.name: LawEnforcement
reddit_subreddits.context: Evidence processing, digital forensics tool discussions. On-premise deployment is the key selling point for LE.

reddit_subreddits.name: digitalforensics
reddit_subreddits.context: Tool recommendations, workflow challenges. Cellebrite/Magnet users who also deal with document evidence. Adjacent to our core but strong overlap.

reddit_subreddits.name: cybersecurity
reddit_subreddits.context: Investigation tools, incident response document management. Cross-vertical. Lower signal-to-noise ratio — scan less frequently.

reddit_subreddits.name: InsuranceProfessional
reddit_subreddits.context: Claims investigation, fraud detection, SIU workflows. Document-heavy fraud cases are RaaS targets.

reddit_subreddits.name: cryptocurrency
reddit_subreddits.context: Compliance discussions, investigation tools. High noise — filter aggressively for compliance/investigation content, ignore price/trading talk.

reddit_subreddits.name: compliance
reddit_subreddits.context: AML, regulatory document management. Cross-vertical but strong signal for crypto compliance and corporate investigation teams.

reddit_subreddits.name: whitecollar
reddit_subreddits.context: Investigation workflow, document review. White-collar defense attorneys are primary RaaS targets.

reddit_subreddits.name: CFE
reddit_subreddits.context: Certified fraud examiners. Independent practitioners handling document-heavy fraud cases. Similar profile to small law firms for RaaS.

brave_web_topics.name: eDiscovery Pain Points
brave_web_topics.query: ediscovery document review cost expensive alternative small firm
brave_web_topics.context: Industry news, blog posts, articles about eDiscovery costs and alternatives.

brave_web_topics.name: LE Evidence & Digital Forensics Tools
brave_web_topics.query: law enforcement evidence management digital forensics tool software
brave_web_topics.context: News about LE evidence processing tools, backlogs, procurement.

brave_web_topics.name: Insurance SIU & Fraud Investigation
brave_web_topics.query: insurance fraud investigation SIU document review claims investigation tools
brave_web_topics.context: SIU team tooling, fraud ring investigations, document-heavy claims.

brave_web_topics.name: Crypto Compliance Document Pain
brave_web_topics.query: cryptocurrency compliance investigation documents SAR filing off-chain evidence
brave_web_topics.context: Compliance teams struggling with document volumes alongside blockchain tracing.

brave_web_topics.name: Corporate Internal Investigations
brave_web_topics.query: corporate internal investigation document review HR investigation whistleblower compliance
brave_web_topics.context: Corporate investigation teams dealing with cross-departmental document review.

brave_web_topics.name: Competitor Dissatisfaction
brave_web_topics.query: Relativity expensive OR Nuix frustrating OR DISCO alternative OR Palantir alternative investigation
brave_web_topics.context: People frustrated with expensive or difficult enterprise platforms. Strong Ingestigate prospects.

brave_web_topics.name: Relativity IPO & Industry Shifts
brave_web_topics.context: Relativity just filed for IPO. Industry chatter about what this means for pricing, competition, alternatives.
